metadata.description: A comprehensive marketplace of 23 production-ready plugins with universal agentic skills for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI, Antigravity IDE, OpenCode, Cursor, and 35+ AI coding agents. Features specialized plugins for development, productivity, content creation, cloud management, multi-agent orchestration, safety, and SEO/GEO/RAG optimization. Compatible with npx skills for cross-platform discovery and installation.

plugins.name: social-media
plugins.description: Generate high-engagement posts for Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram and Facebook with trend analysis and content-writer agents.

plugins.name: github-integration
plugins.description: Manage GitHub issues and pull requests through custom commands and the GitHub MCP server.

plugins.name: notion-workspace
plugins.description: Search and update Notion pages and databases via the Notion MCP server.

plugins.name: clickup-tasks
plugins.description: Create and manage ClickUp tasks, lists and time tracking using the ClickUp MCP server.

plugins.name: playwright-testing
plugins.description: Write and execute end-to-end browser tests with Playwright and a QA engineer subagent.

plugins.name: context7-docs
plugins.description: Fetch hallucination-free documentation for any library using Context7.

plugins.name: cloudflare-platform
plugins.description: Deploy Cloudflare Workers, manage KV storage and interact with AI Gateway via Cloudflare MCP servers.

plugins.name: neon-db
plugins.description: Interact with serverless Postgres databases on Neon using the Postgres MCP server.

plugins.name: vercel-deploy
plugins.description: Manage Vercel projects and deployments through the Vercel MCP server.

plugins.name: devops-flow
plugins.description: Integrated DevOps workflow combining Cloudflare deployments, GitHub PR management, and Slack notifications with hooks.

plugins.name: knowledge-synapse
plugins.description: Knowledge retrieval combining Context7 documentation, Notion notes, and Google Drive with intelligent synthesis.

plugins.name: task-commander
plugins.description: Unified task management with ClickUp, Slack notifications, Gmail integration, and Google Calendar scheduling.

plugins.name: qa-droid
plugins.description: Automated QA workflow with Playwright testing, Slack/Gmail result notifications, and test report generation.

plugins.name: data-core
plugins.description: Advanced Neon/Postgres database operations with migration support and query optimization.

plugins.name: marketplace-cli
plugins.description: CLI utilities for searching, browsing, validating, and managing AgentHaus marketplace plugins.

plugins.name: ux-ui
plugins.description: Polish and improve front-end UX/UI, accessibility, design and responsiveness for Tailwind CSS projects.

plugins.name: agent-handoff
plugins.description: State-based task handoff between agents using a shared blackboard protocol for multi-agent workflows.

plugins.name: circuit-breaker
plugins.description: Pre-built safety guardrails as reusable hooks: deploy gates, test requirements, and budget warnings.

plugins.name: agent-memory
plugins.description: Shared persistent memory across agent sessions using Neon Postgres for recall and learning.

plugins.name: shadow-mode
plugins.description: Training mode where agents draft outputs to a review queue instead of executing directly.

plugins.name: fleet-commander
plugins.description: Visualization and control of running agent sessions with task board monitoring and dispatch.

plugins.name: plugin-auditor
plugins.description: Security scanner that audits plugins for risks including shell injection, credential exposure, and unsafe patterns.

plugins.name: openclaw-bridge
plugins.description: Convert AgentHaus plugins to OpenClaw skill format and provide remote control via messaging.

plugins.name: seo-geo-rag
plugins.description: Six-phase SEO, GEO, and RAG optimization skill. Audits metadata, generates llms.txt and AI-FAQ.md, injects JSON-LD schemas, and optimizes projects for Traditional Search, AI search engines, and LLM RAG ingestion.

plugins.name: gog-workspace
plugins.description: Google Workspace CLI integration for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Tasks, Contacts, and Chat using gogcli.

plugins.name: wp-cli-fleet
plugins.description: Manage WordPress sites and fleets via WP-CLI with agentic workflows for inventory, updates, health checks, search-replace, and Pods CPT management.
